title: gordonia ceylanica var. elliptica
intro: Gordonia ceylanica var. elliptica, also known as Ceylon ironwood, is a plant species native to Sri Lanka, characterized by its large, elliptical leaves and small, yellow flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gordonia ceylanica var. elliptica include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and protecting against oxidative stress. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction, tincture, or powder, and is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems.
